title: This Indicator Tells You Exactly When Trend Is UP or DOWN!
thesis_bullets: It is built based on triple exponentially smoothed moving average and because of this it can filter the majority of noises on the chart.

This is one of the best trend indicator on TradingView that can help you with trends and momentum changes in the market, making it a perfect choice for trend following strategies and reversal trading strategies.
All right let's add the indicator.
Here we click on indicators and we search trex TRIX.
This one trex histogram which is written by just Uncle L.
All right this is the indicator and as you can see it's added here below the chart.
This is actually an oscillator and you can see that we have a histogram and a line that are moving above and below the center line which is zero.

As I mentioned at the beginning of the video this oscillator is built based on triple exponentially smoothed moving average consider an exponential moving average that is smoothed three times and because of this it has the ability to remove many of the noises on the price chart.
So regardless of the noises and short term fluctuations that you see on the chart it can give you a stable picture of the trends and momentum changes inside the trends.
All right getting back to the indicator this histogram is trex.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
